# Josué David Zeledón Crespi — UX/UI Portfolio

> Diseñador Industrial reconvertido en UX/UI Senior con 5 años de experiencia. Especializado en design systems, migraciones de plataformas y experiencias digitales que generan confianza.

## About

- Name: Josué David Zeledón Crespi
- Role: Senior UX/UI Designer
- Location: San José, Costa Rica
- Email: jdzeledonc@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/josue-david-zeledón-crespi-388916190
- Website: https://josuezeledon.com

## Skills

- UX/UI Design
- Design Systems (foundations, components, variables, prototypes)
- Figma (end-to-end)
- User Research
- Information Architecture
- Interaction Design
- Visual Design
- Platform Migrations
- AI-assisted Design Workflows

## Experience

### Senior Product Designer — BetAnything (2024–Present)
UX Senior role leading design system creation and platform migration from external agency to in-house scalable practice. Contributed to information architecture restructuring, component libraries, and cross-functional collaboration with Product, Engineering, Content, and Stakeholders.

### Web & Mobile Visual Design Consultant — Cisco Systems (2022–2024)
Contributed to the Cisco Design System. Worked embedded in cross-functional teams on research, interface design, and platform enhancements for desktop, tablet, and mobile.

### Web & App Visual Design Consultant — Accenture / SynOps (2022)
UX prototype and immersive commerce design for SynOps Next Generation platform. Research, interface design, and graphics for desktop.

### Media & Graphics Design Analyst (2019–2022)
Visual design and media production for multiple clients.

## Education

- Ingeniería en Diseño Industrial — Tecnológico de Costa Rica (TEC), Cartago (2014–2023)
- Google UX Design Certificate — 7-course Professional Certificate (2022–2026)

## Case Studies

### 1. BetAnything — Platform Migration & Design System
Migrated from an external agency model to an in-house scalable design practice. Created a comprehensive design system with foundations, components, and documentation. Restructured the information architecture and established content strategy.

### 2. Cisco Systems — Design System & Enhancements
Contributed to the Cisco Design System over 2 years. Conducted research, designed interfaces, and delivered enhancements across desktop, tablet, and mobile platforms.

### 3. SynOps Next Generation — Accenture
Designed UX prototypes for an immersive commerce platform. Focused on research-driven interface design and graphics for a desktop application.

### 4. PULSE DJ + Live Music
Interface design for a multi-touch table music application. Created modern UI with custom iconography, loop visualization, and a recording flow designed for creative workflows.
